Anyone got any Nymph comps?

I've been running Lone Feather in my Lotan Comp since pre-buff, and now post buff it feels really strong. The ailemus regen is kinda ridiculous - I run it on Thais and it lets me spam ult on Lotan almost as if I was using frenzy Lotan, but I'm running Celestial Beast so the dps is great.

(Team Looks like this atm, whisper is the wheel im most likely to swap out, the extra ailemus on casiah is nice since it lets me gamble for my 'Outs' a little more consistently, but theres almost certainly something better, Similarly with Flamebound Navigator, theres probably something better but I havent found it yet.)
Her*

Looking at things a little more, Rewinding time might be okay on Ogier to Reuse the Taunt enemies Backline skill. Would need to test it. But regardless I'd urge anyone running Lotan or another strike heavy comp to consider Lone Feather for the Ailemus Regen on a support.

Hey so I am working on this, but I am not sure about the wheel and posse choice, any suggestions?
Too much costs
It's 3 costs + 4 costs + 3 costs + 2 costs if i'm not wrong?
Yeah, just not sure really which wheels to run, the goal is basically exalt with at least 2 characters every turn
Which is achievable without the most of the wheels
If you want to run something more viable you can try fouette
You fouette on doresain
The goal is to dupe his 60 alienus regen
You can also use stuffs that draw more cardq upon exalt
You also don't have cleanse so anything that's bleed or poison related will brick your team over time
That's true
Faced an uvash team, thankfully I out dpsed the combo turn before it mattered
Either use nobleman staff but it cost 5 arithmetica and stun you
Or doll / leigh for cleanse but you get less barrier because no corpo
Or horla but need exalt
Or tinct / cassiah
But cassiah is rng
I'll need to see what to replace then, corpo is there as she both has a super tanky kit and an aliemus generator
Tbh
If you go corpo then castor feels useless
It's good to 1 amplification AoE
But it cost 4 for that taunt cards
Your team doesn't regen that much arithmetica, only praying for murphy to RNG 2 max arith first hand
True, the thing with castor is the feather generatior which is bith aliemus dmg and barrier which synergies with the corpo dmg skill
Yes but in that case you make doresain DPS, not corpo
The strat you want is to make corpo DPS
But your doresain brick this team if that the case
Doresain was always the last pick here as he is pretty selfish barring the 1 cost skill
But I chose him as he can solo dps pretty nicely alone and scales good with amplification
Then use stuff like gramona
She is hyper cancer
Her kit can copy doresain cards thus making her a sub DPS
I see
Murphy is just alienus and arith max
